text:
Good. I am glad you like it. And, Nova, I hope this taught you an important lesson about honesty. This is the sort of lesson every person needs to learn at some point if they want to be a good person. If you can't do something, just be honest. It is okay to ask for help. We are partners, right? I have your back and you have mine. :)

When you feel ready, you can go ahead and continue on your architecture review.
